name: The Princess is also the Dragon
author: Luxray
bootlegger: The Non-Boffin Hermit with the Damsel ability registers as the Damsel to the Huntsman during set-up and during the game.
If the Boffin gives the Demon the Hermit ability, it does not include the Heretic ability.
The Sweetheart ability cannot drunk players with the Heretic ability, and is the only ability that can droison the Poppy Grower.
